infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs access to your location to show nearby drivers and provide ride services.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app needs access to your location in the background for real-time tracking during rides.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to your camera to upload profile photos and vehicle documents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photo library to upload profile photos and vehicle documents.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Ombia Express to use your location for ride services.
